title: Oaks Advancements
description: Oak's Advancements aims to expand and revamp the vanilla Advancements, Reordering a few of the advancements and adding over 50 new ones that stay within the vanilla expectation.
body:
# Disclaimer, this mod is currently discontinued

Oak's Advancements aims to bring a refreshing overhaul to the vanilla Advancement system in Minecraft. With a focus on enhancing the gameplay experience, Oak's Advancements introduces over 50 new Advancements while also reordering the existing ones.

This mod is designed to seamlessly integrate with the vanilla Minecraft experience, ensuring that the new Advancements align with the game's original concept and expectations. By expanding the existing Advancements and introducing new ones, Oak's Advancements provides players with a wealth of exciting goals and challenges to pursue.
